text.message: Wow, I knew you were alive Jesus but now I can play Catan with you too?? Incredible
is there a better reason for resurrection than to play catan?
Hey, only you would know the answer to that one Lord!
i thinking that I'd like to win the game
wish there was some wheat left
well i was thinking to block you
i didnt even click that tile
not sure i should be, youre very strong
Maybe one day can be strong like bull
Yeah gotta be careful trading grain
so they get 2nb and 1ns out of it
I mean I wasn't the rob either way
tbf u were getting robbed anyway
Could do next brick with this
Blue if you do this you can take back the nb
The thought crossed my mind because I think
I am only one without city
I think red is killing actually but you with wheat is quite good
you get road for sure and can do anything with sheep and wheat port
I don't see how to win once my 8 becomes a blocking target
your 8 gets blocked less if i settle there
We'll see what kind of player you are now
I meant that turn I didn’t have the resources
Two ore I would trade the plow
That's a bit extreme good sir
could be nice and give me a sheep blue
Was also thinking plowing the 3 lol
i only accepted because red did
very likely red has a mono
You guys giving me too much credit
Ya I’m just saying I’m not running away
Can't trade red now me thinks
Red might win this orbit or next anyways
Might go to 9 flipping a knight here
Think you needed if anything to do that
Try to protect against red winning very soon
Now I am out of the game
Well taking me out of the game doesn't help extend it
Black u were my road comp
sorry but it makes sense for me
Should have plowed orange, oh well
i think i wouldve waited for a better sheep mono if i were you
Blue you actually owe me one too
